heading: General provisions regarding the Institute
label: 285t–3 General provisions regarding the Institute
text: The Secretary, acting through the Director of the National Institutes of Health, shall provide administrative support and support services to the Director of the Institute and shall ensure that such support takes maximum advantage of existing administrative structures at the agencies of the National Institutes of Health.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 287c–34 of this titlePub. L. 111–148
